It also shows weaker but relevant concerns about accountability for AI-assisted outputs, attention being delegated to summaries, and AI-mediated fluency for non-native English-speaking colleagues.
voice_opacity_rationale: The speaker does use AI to refine written communication, which can standardize tone, but explicitly describes trying to preserve authentic human style and avoid text that reads as AI-generated in donor relationships. This is direct evidence that AI-mediated writing can obscure personhood cues and that the speaker actively works against that effect.
